title: Lab: Build a Content-Driven Emergency Newspaper
summary: Lab: Build a Content-Driven Emergency Newspaper retrieves prior skills in an original independent source-order track-sizing and alignment build scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply grid formatting context, grid track sizing, grid placement, grid areas, grid auto fit fill, grid alignment, grid subgrid, css debug method in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real independent source-order track-sizing and alignment build artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
